pages.title: Aeronautical Engineer
pages.text: Discipline 1 of $(l:classes/engineer)Engineer$(/l). Builds aircraft and drilling vehicles. Twenty-six items: all twenty Immersive Aircraft components plus six Immersive Machinery vehicles.

pages.title: Signature parts
pages.text: $(bold)Propellers, hulls, sails.$(/) The frame of every aircraft.$(br2)$(bold)Boilers and engines.$(/) Boiler, Steel Boiler, Engine, Eco Engine, Nether Engine. The top-tier engines need a Mechanical drill (interlock); Nether Engine also needs two Electrical motors.$(br2)$(bold)Armaments.$(/) Rotary Cannon, Bomb Bay, Heavy Crossbow.$(br2)$(bold)Vehicles.$(/) Iron Drill, Diamond Drill, Netherite Drill, Tunnel Digger, Copperfin sub, Bamboo Bee.

pages.title: Vehicle assembly
pages.text: $(bold)You make parts.$(/) The biplane, airship, gyrodyne, quadrocopter, cargo airship, warship, and bamboo hopper are not class-gated. Anyone holding the parts can assemble the vehicle.$(br2)Pack rule: sell foundations, not products.$(br2)Matching trader: the Engineer.
